mediaconnect.bridgeoutput.CfnAbout: Adds outputs to an existing bridge.

mediaconnect.bridgeoutput.BridgeArn.Description: The ARN of the bridge that you want to describe.

mediaconnect.bridgeoutput.Name.Description: The network output name. This name is used to reference the output and must be unique among outputs in this bridge.

mediaconnect.bridgeoutput.NetworkOutput.Description: Add a network output to an existing bridge.
